auth.label: API Key
auth.description: Firecrawl API key used with the Authorization Bearer header. Create it in Firecrawl API Keys: https://firecrawl.dev/app/api-keys.

actions.name: agent_cancel
actions.description: Cancel a running Firecrawl agent job by job ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

status.description: The final status returned by Firecrawl.

message.description: The cancellation message returned by Firecrawl.

actions.name: batch_scrape
actions.description: Start a Firecrawl batch scrape job for multiple URLs and return the async job ID.

urls.description: The URLs to scrape in batch.

type.description: The browser action type, such as click, write, wait, or press.

selector.description: The CSS selector targeted by the action.

text.description: The text to type for write actions.

key.description: The key to press for press actions.

milliseconds.description: The duration in milliseconds used by wait-style actions.

items.description: A browser action to perform before scraping.

actions.description: The browser actions to run before each scrape.

type.description: The structured format type, such as json or screenshot.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to send with the request.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to request from.

languages.description: The preferred locales for the request.

events.description: The webhook events that should trigger notifications.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to send with the request.

webhook.description: Webhook callback settings for async jobs.

maxAge.description: The cache max age in milliseconds.

maxConcurrency.description: The maximum concurrency for the batch job.

onlyMainContent.description: Whether to keep only the main content of each page.

includeTags.description: The HTML tags that should be prioritized in the extracted content.

excludeTags.description: The HTML tags that should be removed from the output.

mobile.description: Whether to emulate a mobile device.

proxy.description: The proxy mode to use for the request.

ignoreInvalidURLs.description: Whether invalid URLs should be ignored instead of failing the job.

blockAds.description: Whether ad resources should be blocked.

storeInCache.description: Whether Firecrawl should store the result in cache.

removeBase64Images.description: Whether base64-encoded images should be removed from the output.

skipTlsVerification.description: Whether TLS verification should be skipped.

zeroDataRetention.description: Whether the request should opt into zero data retention.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

success.description: Whether the job was accepted successfully.

url.description: The status URL returned by Firecrawl.

invalidURLs.description: The invalid URLs rejected before the job started.

outputSchema.description: A Firecrawl async job start response.

actions.name: batch_scrape_cancel
actions.description: Cancel a running Firecrawl batch scrape job by job ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

status.description: The final status returned by Firecrawl.

message.description: The cancellation message returned by Firecrawl.

actions.name: batch_scrape_get
actions.description: Get the current status and paged results of a Firecrawl batch scrape job by job ID.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

total.description: The total number of queued or discovered items.

completed.description: The number of completed items in the job.

creditsUsed.description: The credits used by the job.

expiresAt.description: The ISO 8601 expiry timestamp for the job data.

anyOf.description: The pagination URL for the next segment of data.

data.description: The result items returned by Firecrawl.

error.description: An error message returned by Firecrawl.

outputSchema.description: A Firecrawl paged async job status response.

actions.name: batch_scrape_get_errors
actions.description: Get the failed URLs and robots.txt blocks from a Firecrawl batch scrape job.

inputSchema.description: The input payload for this action.

items.description: An error item returned by Firecrawl.

errors.description: The failed items for the job.

actions.name: crawl
actions.description: Start a Firecrawl crawl job with compatibility input fields.

url.description: The seed URL for the crawl.

prompt.description: A natural-language prompt that guides crawl option generation.

includePaths.description: The path patterns that the crawl should include.

excludePaths.description: The path patterns that the crawl should exclude.

maxDiscoveryDepth.description: The maximum depth for link discovery.

limit.description: The maximum number of pages to crawl.

delay.description: The delay between crawl requests in milliseconds.

maxConcurrency.description: The maximum concurrency for the crawl job.

allowBackwardLinks.description: Whether backward links should be followed for compatibility.

allowExternalLinks.description: Whether external links should be followed.

crawlEntireDomain.description: Whether the entire domain should be crawled.

ignoreSitemap.description: Whether the sitemap should be ignored.

ignoreQueryParameters.description: Whether query parameters should be ignored when deduplicating pages.

sitemap.description: Whether sitemap discovery should be enabled.

events.description: The webhook events that should trigger notifications.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to send with the request.

webhook.description: Webhook callback settings for async jobs.

selector.description: The CSS selector targeted by the action.

text.description: The text to type for write actions.

formats.description: The formats to return from Firecrawl.

languages.description: The preferred locales for the request.

waitFor.description: The delay in milliseconds before extraction starts.

maxAge.description: The cache max age in milliseconds.

onlyMainContent.description: Whether to keep only the main content of the page.

mobile.description: Whether to emulate a mobile device.

includeTags.description: The HTML tags that should be prioritized in the extracted content.

excludeTags.description: The HTML tags that should be removed from the extracted content.

parsers.description: The parser plugins to enable for the request.

parsePDF.description: Whether PDF parsing should be enabled.

proxy.description: The proxy mode to use for the request.

removeBase64Images.description: Whether base64-encoded images should be removed from the output.

blockAds.description: Whether ad resources should be blocked.

skipTlsVerification.description: Whether TLS certificate verification should be skipped.

zeroDataRetention.description: Whether the request should opt into zero data retention.

actions.name: extract
actions.description: Start a Firecrawl extract job that returns structured data for one or more URLs.

urls.description: The URLs to extract structured data from.

type.description: The browser action type, such as click, write, wait, or press.

selector.description: The CSS selector targeted by the action.

text.description: The text to type for write actions.

key.description: The key to press for press actions.

milliseconds.description: The duration in milliseconds used by wait-style actions.

formats.description: The formats to return from Firecrawl.

headers.description: Custom HTTP headers to send with the request.

country.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 country code to request from.

languages.description: The preferred locales for the request.

prompt.description: An extraction prompt that explains the desired JSON structure.

waitFor.description: The delay in milliseconds before extraction starts.

maxAge.description: The cache max age in milliseconds.

onlyMainContent.description: Whether to keep only the main content of the page.

mobile.description: Whether to emulate a mobile device.

includeTags.description: The HTML tags that should be prioritized in the extracted content.

excludeTags.description: The HTML tags that should be removed from the extracted content.

parsers.description: The parser plugins to enable for the request.

blockAds.description: Whether ad resources should be blocked.

zeroDataRetention.description: Whether the request should opt into zero data retention.

enableWebSearch.description: Whether web search should be enabled for the extraction.

ignoreSitemap.description: Whether sitemap discovery should be ignored.

includeSubdomains.description: Whether subdomains should be considered for the extraction.

ignoreInvalidURLs.description: Whether invalid URLs should be ignored instead of failing the request.

showSources.description: Whether cited sources should be returned.

items.description: A source object returned by Firecrawl.

sources.description: The sources used by the extraction request.

urlTrace.description: The trace of URLs visited by the extraction request.
